label: Ceasefires Currently in Force
contestNote: Trump extended US–Iran ceasefire indefinitely Apr 21 (contingent on Iran submitting a proposal); IRGC seized 2 vessels in Strait of Hormuz Apr 22; Lebanon 10-day ceasefire (Apr 16) up for extension at State Dept talks Apr 22; DRC–M23 COVM operational
deltaNote: vs Jan 2026 (Sudan, Gaza Phase II unresolved, Yemen spillover); Lebanon + Iran ceasefire extension partially offset by ongoing violations
